{extend name="layouts/base" /} {block name="content"}
{$company['name']['label']} {$company['name']['value']}
{$company['origin_country']['label']} {$company['origin_country']['value']}
{$company['profile']['label']} {$company['profile']['value']}
{$company['logo']['label']}
{$company['email']['label']} {$company['email']['value']}
{$company['address_line1']['label']} {$company['address_line1']['value']}
{$company['address_line2']['label']} {$company['address_line2']['value']}
{$company['postal']['label']} {$company['postal']['value']}
{$company['country']['label']} {$company['country']['value']}
{$company['phone']['label']} {$company['phone']['value']}
{$company['fax']['label']} {$company['fax']['value']}
{$company['website']['label']} {$company['website']['value']}
{/block}
